title: Radon gas in your home - Canada.ca
content:
## Radon gas in your home
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 607 KB, 1 page)
Organization: Health Canada
Published: September 2022
Radon is the #1 cause of lung cancer in non-smokers.
TEST to find out if you have a dangerous level.
Purchase a long-term radon test online
Follow the instructions provided to properly place the test kit in your home.
After 3 months send your radon test kit to the lab to be analysed using the return packaging and instructions provided.
You will receive your result within a few weeks.
Are you interested in participating in future radon research? Email radonsurveys-enquetessurleradon@hc-sc.gc.ca
If your radon level is below 200 Footnote * no action is required.
For radon levels above 200 Footnote * , take action to reduce.
Contact radon@hc-sc.gc.ca or visit Canada.ca/radon .
Health professionals visit: radon.machealth.ca .
